emails.subject: Competitive Analysis
emails.body: Competitive Analysis Hey Kevin- thanks for the intro at the Fundy meeting on Friday- would like to sit down with you to talk priorities this week if you have time. For Power East, I know you want maximum bang for your buck across a limited number of projects, so I'm thinking: 1. New Gen 2. Hydro Quebec reservoir levels 3. Oil "shock"/terrorism 4. Coal- utility stockpiles Thanks, Robert Johnston x39934

emails.subject: RE: Competitive Analysis
emails.body: RE: Competitive Analysis Obviously, coordination with gas and power fundies (rika imai and chris gaskill) is important for almost all projects unless confidentiality is necessary given the nature of the project scope. My view is No. 1 is part of Rika's core day to day world. No. 2 and No. 4 are more special project in nature and this is a gap you could help fill. I will be out Wednesday through Friday so we should sit down tomorrow. To: Presto, Kevin M.

emails.subject: RE: Competitive Analysis
emails.body: I plan on meeting with Rika and Chris regularly, particularly with Rika on new gen. What time is good for you tomorrow and where are you located? RJ

emails.subject: RE: Competitive Analysis
emails.body: I sit at 06543 (will be moving Wednesday/Thursday). I can meet mid-morning tommorow. Get on my calender with TJ at 35800. thanks.

emails.subject: RE: Competitive Analysis
emails.body: will do- I'll see if Rika is available as well
